description: Manual per-route overrides. Any field set here wins over scraped/derived data. Route IDs are case-insensitive (use `N128` not `n128`). Entries whose key starts with an underscore (e.g. `_example`) are ignored — use them for documentation. Rebuild with `npm run build-classifications && npm run build-overview` to apply.

routes._N128_note: N128 is the night branding of the 128 (24-hour service per londonbusroutes.net). Pipeline now auto-inherits via routes.htm href-share detection, but this explicit entry pins the operator in case the scrape fails.
